$comment: Scheduler policy — defines state classifications, scoring weights, and priority tiers. Read by scheduler.mjs and integrity-bridge.mjs. Edit via Architect RFC only.

score_parameters.comment: All parameters relevant to deterministic scoring. Changes require Architect RFC.

score_weights.comment: Must sum to 1.0. Components are normalized to [0,1] before weighting.

priority_tiers.comment: Discrete exponential multipliers derived from task.priority_weight. priority_weight is mapped to the highest tier it satisfies.
